svg.text: California -> Northern California -> San Francisco Bay Area -> East Bay
Contra Costa County contains San Ramon, our city focus
Contra Costa is the countywide data layer; San Ramon is one city inside it.
Orange = Contra Costa County. Light blue = neighboring Bay Area counties.
Bay Area zoom: East Bay focus
Contra Costa is east of San Francisco and north of Alameda County.
San Ramon is in the southern part of Contra Costa County.
Source: U.S. Census Bureau 2025 county and place boundaries.
